side_effects.description: Thick dead skin peeling on lips and facial skin, chapped lips

protocol_notes: Injected into glutes. Already taking zinc/Quercetin supplement prior to starting. Weather cooler during usage. By follow-up (January), facial skin dryness resolved and skin looked great. Lips improved but slightly dry still, attributed partially to dry/cold January weather. Described as 'mild and acceptable' side effect.
